response.justification: While Bogdan is an exceptional full-stack engineer with 20 years of diverse experience, he is fundamentally mismatched for this C++ specialist role. His C++ experience is limited to 6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015, making it over a decade stale. His career has focused on web/cloud technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, AWS, React), embedded systems (DLang), and open-source platforms. The role requires deep modern C++ expertise, industrial automation background, multi-threaded networking systems, and security standards (IEC 62443, SDL) that are not demonstrated. This represents a significant career pivot away from his proven strengths.
strengths: Proven system architect with experience designing high-performance, scalable systems (GISCollective, micro-services handling millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby)
Strong mentorship and knowledge-sharing culture (organized refactoring dojos, created multiple training courses, active in open-source community leadership)
Cloud and modern development stack experience (AWS CDK, React, Node.js) covering some advantageous skills for the role
concerns: C++ expertise is minimal and severely outdated (6 months in 2014-2015); primary languages are TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang—wrong tech stack for core role requirements
No demonstrated experience with industrial automation, IoT platforms, embedded systems, or mandatory security standards (IEC 62443, SDL, secure coding practices)
Missing low-level systems expertise: no evidence of multi-threaded networking, message brokers, MQTT, or industrial protocols (Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850, OPC UA)

key_factors.factor: Industrial automation and security standards expertise
Software engineering maturity and architectural capability
